aljazeera.title: Who is Iranian oil tycoon Shamkhani whose ship is stranded in Hormuz?

monitor_the_situation.title: IDF Pursues West Bank Car Ramming Attack Suspects
— S3 · Conflict · West Bank, Palestine · 45m ago. Israeli Defense Forces are hunting suspects in a car ramming attack near Shavei Shomron checkpoint in the West Bank.
Report: 90% of Gaza Destroyed, 80% Seized by Israel After 1,00 Days of War

— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 1h ago. A new report following 1,00 days since October 7, 2023, indicates 90% of the Gaza Strip is destroyed and 80% is under Israeli control, with peace efforts stalled.
Iranian Guards Kill Five Kurdish Militants in Northwest Iran
— S3 · Conflict · Northwest Iran · 3h ago. Iran's Revolutionary Guards killed five PDKI militants in northwest Iran amid heightened tensions with Kurdish groups.
